2605.09308.title: Hierarchical Attention-based Graph Neural Network with Relevance-driven Pruning
2605.09308.paper_summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) excel at relational reasoning but face two persistent challenges: the lack of interpretable attribution for heterogeneous node types, and the computational overhead of message passing over large, noisy graphs. We propose the Hierarchical Attention-based Heterogeneous GNN (HA-HeteroGNN), a framework that addresses both issues through a unied explainability-to-pruning pipeline. A two-tier attention mechanism separates sensor-level and context-level computation across 16 node types and 18 edge types, producing per-node relevance scores via an attention-based GNN Explainer without requiring gradient backpropagation. These relevance scores then serve as a principled pruning criterion: removing nodes identied as consistently uninformative yields a 27% reduction in graph edges while simultaneously improving classication accuracy by 2.46.1% across all model variants, challenging the conventional assumption that pruning necessarily trades accuracy for eciency. Experiments on a 50,000-record synthetic dataset spanning 11 report categories demonstrate 97.5% cross-strategy explanation stability and domain consistent sensor attribution, with training-time reductions of up to 43.9% and real-time inference latency of approximately 5860 ms per sample.
2605.09308.paper_summary_zh: 圖神經網絡（GNNs）在關係推理方面表現出色，但面臨兩個持續的挑戰：異質節點類型缺乏可解釋的歸因，以及在大型噪聲圖上進行消息傳遞的計算開銷。我們提出了基於層次注意力的異質 GNN（HA-HeteroGNN），這是一個通過統一的可解釋性到剪枝管道來解決這兩個問題的框架。一個兩層的注意力機制在 16 種節點類型和 18 種邊類型之間分離傳感器級別和上下文級別的計算，通過基於注意力的 GNN 解釋器生成每個節點的相關性分數，而不需要梯度反向傳播。這些相關性分數隨後作為一個原則性的剪枝標準：移除被識別為持續無信息的節點可使圖邊減少 27%，同時在所有模型變體中將分類準確度提高 2.46.1%，挑戰了剪枝必然以準確度換取效率的傳統假設。在一個涵蓋 11 種報告類別的 50,000 條記錄的合成數據集上的實驗顯示，97.5% 的跨策略解釋穩定性和領域一致的傳感器歸因，訓練時間減少高達 43.9%，每個樣本的實時推斷延遲約為 5860 毫秒。
2605.09308.author: Seungwoo Kum et.al.
